The care you're looking for

Every treatment starts with a consultation and a plan — you know in advance what to expect, what it will cost and why we do it this way.

ImplantsPRF therapyAestheticsHygieneNitrous oxideConservativeSurgeryChildrenWhiteningJointsOrthodontics

Implants

A missing tooth doesn't have to mean a compromise. A dental implant is a titanium root inserted into the jaw, onto which a crown is placed — visually and functionally indistinguishable from your own tooth.

We plan implants based on a 3D X-ray that shows us the exact bone structure. Prosthetic work — crowns, bridges and full dentures — is made in our own laboratory. This means we control quality from start to finish and shorten the waiting time.

For surgical procedures we use PRF therapy, which uses the patient's own blood to support natural tissue healing.

The price of an implant is determined individually after consultation.
Call us — we'll discuss what you need
implant photo

PRF therapy — healing from your own blood

PRF is an autologous regenerative method that uses the patient's own blood. From a small blood draw, centrifugation yields a concentrate containing growth factors and bioactive molecules. This is applied directly to the treatment site, where it supports natural healing processes, collagen formation and cell renewal.

In dentistry we use PRF for:

  • Supporting healing after extractions
  • Implant procedures
  • Periodontal tissue regeneration
  • Bone augmentation and sinus lift
  • Treatment of periodontitis

Další oblasti využití: Other areas of use: aesthetic medicine (improving skin quality, reducing fine lines, skin elasticity, post-procedure recovery, scar appearance), hair growth support (androgenetic alopecia, diffuse hair loss) and musculoskeletal system (osteoarthritis, joint pain, tendinopathy).

Bezpečnost: Safety: PRF uses exclusively the patient's own biological material — the risk of allergic reaction is minimal and biological compatibility is high. Treatment takes approximately 30–60 minutes.

The suitability of PRF therapy is determined by the doctor after consultation.
Call and arrange an appointment
PRF centrifuge photo

Aesthetic dentistry

Veneers, crowns, composite adjustments or full smile reconstructions — aesthetic treatment with us is based on precise diagnosis with an intraoral scanner and work in our own laboratory.

We plan every procedure so the result looks natural. We don't make "Hollywood smiles" on demand — we make teeth that fit your face and last.

Book a consultation
aesthetics photo

Dental hygiene

Regular professional hygiene extends the life of fillings, crowns and implants. It removes tartar and staining that you can't manage with home care.

The hygienist will also show you how to care for your teeth at home — the right brushing technique, interdental brushes, floss. Prevention is always cheaper than treatment.

Book a hygiene appointment
hygiene photo

Treatment with nitrous oxide

If you're afraid of treatment, you don't need to be ashamed — and you don't need to keep putting off your dentist visit because of it.

Nitrous oxide is inhaled through a nasal mask during treatment. It induces a state of relaxation and reduces the perception of unpleasant stimuli. The patient remains conscious, breathes on their own and the effect wears off quickly after treatment.

We offer nitrous oxide for adults and children. It is a safe way to get through treatment comfortably.

Tell reception you're interested
nitrous oxide photo

Conservative dentistry

Fillings, root canal treatment, treatment of tooth decay — the basis of why you go to the dentist. We work under a microscope that allows us to see details invisible to the naked eye. This means more precise work, smaller interventions and better results.

We choose materials for fillings and restorations based on the specific situation — always with regard to durability and aesthetics.

Book an appointment
conservative dentistry photo

Surgical procedures

Wisdom tooth extractions, surgical extraction of impacted teeth, root apex resections and other surgical procedures in the oral cavity.

For surgical procedures we routinely use PRF therapy — a concentrate from the patient's own blood that supports healing and reduces the risk of post-operative complications. Procedures are planned on the basis of a 3D X-ray.

Call and arrange a consultation
surgery photo

Children's dentistry

A child patient needs a different approach than an adult — more time, more patience and an environment where they won't be afraid.

We treat children from their first milk teeth. We teach them that the dentist is nothing to be afraid of. For the youngest or anxious patients we offer treatment with nitrous oxide, which helps manage fear without general anaesthesia.

Book your child for a check-up
children's dentistry photo

Teeth whitening

Professional in-office whitening is safer and more effective than home kits from the drugstore. The result is visible but natural — it's not about porcelain white, but about your own shade without staining and discolouration.

Before whitening we recommend having a dental hygiene appointment — a clean tooth surface responds to whitening better.

Book a consultation
whitening photo

TMJ and joint treatment

Jaw joint pain, clicking when opening the mouth, headaches originating in the jaw — these are problems that patients often ignore for a long time or try to resolve with other specialists.

We diagnose the cause of the difficulties and propose treatment — from occlusal splints to PRF therapy, which for joint and musculoskeletal problems (osteoarthritis, joint pain, tendinopathy) supports natural tissue regeneration.

Tell us what's bothering you
TMJ photo

Orthodontics

Braces and bite correction are provided in cooperation with an external orthodontist. If you need an assessment of whether orthodontic treatment is appropriate, start with a consultation here — based on the examination we will refer you to the specialist we have a long-term working relationship with.

Call and arrange a consultation
orthodontics photo

Need advice on where to start?

Call us — reception will help you find an appointment and answer basic questions before your visit.
